name: knowledge-foundry
description: A standalone Claude Code skillset and TypeScript CLI for building governed, licensed, versioned, RAG-ready domain knowledge corpora.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @knowledge-foundry/core && npm run build -w @knowledge-foundry/adapters && npm run build -w @knowledge-foundry/cli
scripts.clean: node -e "for (const p of ['packages/core','packages/adapters','packages/cli']) require('fs').rmSync(p + '/dist', {recursive: true, force: true})"
